meaning: adj.显赫的,杰出的,有名的,优良的
examples: She invoked several eminent scholars to back up her argument.
It gives birth to many eminent scholars.
Dickens was pre-eminent among English writers of his day.
International highlights include the eminent Gagosian Gallery, which is making its debut in South America.
School children from years 10-13 joined with eminent scientists to attend lectures, speeches, laboratory demonstrations and discussion groups.
